summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BLUE BAY Fleet Management Route Planning page with Leaflet + OpenStreetMap implementation - All major features working correctly with minor UI interaction issues

ui_bugs.issue: Store markers have overlay/popup interference preventing smooth sequential clicking - popups block subsequent marker clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: JavaScript click events work correctly, manual clicking requires closing popups between clicks

ui_bugs.issue: Vehicle checkboxes not found via standard selectors, but vehicle cards are visible with registration numbers
ui_bugs.note: Vehicle selection UI exists but checkboxes may be custom components

passed_tests: Route Planning page loads successfully with OpenStreetMap tiles covering Kerala
Store markers (5) are visible and clickable on the map with teal color
Store marker selection works - markers change color from teal to green when selected
Selected stores list updates correctly when clicking markers (Selected Stores: 2, Available Stores: 3)
Show Route Preview button works - draws green polyline connecting selected stores
Route distance calculation displays correctly (4.61 km total distance)
Sequence numbers (1,2) appear on stores when route preview is enabled
Warehouse markers (3) are visible with orange color and emoji (📦 Warehouse)
Info popups show detailed store information when clicking markers (address, pincode, contact, phone)
Map legend shows real-time counters for selected/available stores and warehouses
Excel download template button is present and functional
Vehicle selection section shows 3 vehicles with Kerala registration numbers (KL-07-AB-1234, KL-07-CD-5678, KL-09-EF-9012)
Optimize Routes button enables/disables correctly based on selections
Map zoom and pan controls work smoothly (+ and - buttons)
Dark theme is consistent across all map elements including popups and controls
Route Optimization Settings section with Date and Warehouse selection working
OpenStreetMap attribution visible at bottom right
Route preview shows 'Hide Route' button when active
Distance calculation in legend updates correctly (Route: 4.61 km)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements needed: 1) Fix store marker popup overlay issues to allow smooth sequential clicking without manual popup closing, 2) Ensure vehicle selection checkboxes are properly accessible via standard selectors for better testability
